text:
Missouri Tiger swimming and diving alumni Mikel Schreuders is set to compete today at the 2024 Paris Olympics.Schreuders will compete in the 100-meter freestyle preliminaries for Aruba, which begin at 4:15 AM CDT. It is his third time participating in the Olympics,. He holds the records for Aruba in the 50-meter, 100-meter, 200-meter, and 400-meter freestyle events. He is the only Olympic swimmer representing Aruba this year.During his career at Missouri from 2016 to 2019, Schreuders was an All-American honoree thirteen times. He placed first in the 200-meter freestyle at the 2019 Southeastern Conference Championship with a time of 1:31:27, making him Missouri's first ever men's individual swimming and diving title at the SEC Championships.

The Tigers will be in action at the Olympic Games beginning tomorrow morning ð#MIZð¯pic.twitter.com/dDSA57OqRD
